title: s3: Searcher for Search-Only Reinforcement Learning in Retrieval-Augmented Generation

defines.name: s3
defines.definition: A modular RL-based search framework that trains only the retriever/searcher to improve downstream generation quality while keeping the generator frozen.

defines.name: Gain Beyond RAG (GBR)
defines.definition: A reward signal that measures the generation accuracy improvement from retrieved documents over naïve RAG.

problem: Existing agentic RAG methods either optimize retrieval with metrics disconnected from answer quality or entangle retrieval and generation, making search optimization less effective and less compatible with frozen or black-box LLMs.
